# jplawdb2: Japanese Tax Law AI Database v3.0
# Direct-access principle: Read this document, no navigation needed.

## URL Structure
https://jplawdb2.github.io/text/{code}/{id}.txt

## Law Codes ({tax-type}-{document-type} rule)
# Primary statutes
hojin       = Income Tax Act for Corporations (法人税法 / 法法)
hojin-rei   = Corporation Tax Act Enforcement Order (法人税法施行令 / 法令)
hojin-ki    = Corporation Tax Act Enforcement Regulations (法人税法施行規則 / 法規)
sochi       = Act on Special Measures Concerning Taxation (租税特別措置法 / 措法)
sochi-rei   = Special Taxation Measures Enforcement Order (措置法施行令 / 措令)
sochi-ki    = Special Taxation Measures Enforcement Regulations (措置法施行規則 / 措規)
shotoku     = Income Tax Act (所得税法 / 所法)
shotoku-rei = Income Tax Act Enforcement Order (所得税法施行令 / 所令)
shohi       = Consumption Tax Act (消費税法 / 消法)
sozoku      = Inheritance Tax Act (相続税法 / 相法)

## Administrative Guidance Codes (MUST use this table; do NOT guess)
hojin-kihon       = Corporation Tax Basic Circular (法人税基本通達 / 法基通)
shotoku-kihon     = Income Tax Basic Circular (所得税基本通達 / 所基通)
shohi-kihon       = Consumption Tax Basic Circular (消費税基本通達 / 消基通)
sochi-tsu-hojin   = Special Measures Circular, Corp. Tax (措置法通達(法人税関係) / 措通法)
sochi-tsu-shotoku = Special Measures Circular, Income Tax (措置法通達(所得税関係) / 措通所)
sozoku-kihon      = Inheritance Tax Basic Circular (相続税法基本通達 / 相基通)
tpg               = Transfer Pricing Administrative Guidelines (移転価格事務運営指針)

## Court Cases
text/hanrei/{alias}.txt    <- Major cases (with aliases)
text/hanrei/{case_id}.txt  <- All cases (numeric ID)
meta/hanrei.json           <- Search index (case name, articles, keywords)

## Filename Conversion Rules
"の" (no) -> underscore "_"
Example: 措法66の6     -> text/sochi/66_6.txt
Example: 法法22の2     -> text/hojin/22_2.txt
Example: 法法10の4の2の3 -> text/hojin/10_4_2_3.txt
Dashes in circulars are kept as-is:
Example: 法基通2-1-1   -> text/hojin-kihon/2-1-1.txt

## Frequently Used Direct Access
法法22      https://jplawdb2.github.io/text/hojin/22.txt
法法22の2   https://jplawdb2.github.io/text/hojin/22_2.txt
法法37      https://jplawdb2.github.io/text/hojin/37.txt
措法66の6   https://jplawdb2.github.io/text/sochi/66_6.txt
法基通2-1-1 https://jplawdb2.github.io/text/hojin-kihon/2-1-1.txt

## Common Mistakes (MUST READ)
X  Guess circular codes using romaji     -> USE the mapping table above
X  Include "の" directly in URLs         -> CONVERT to underscore
X  Access cases by article name directly -> SEARCH via meta/hanrei.json
X  Look for paragraph/item-level files   -> FIND within article-level file text
X  Access supplementary provisions       -> AVAILABLE in Phase 2+

## What This DB Cannot Do
- Full-text keyword search (use meta/*.json for index-based lookup)
- Historical versions of laws (current version only)
- Direct access to individual paragraphs or items (article-level only)

## Exploratory Access (when ID is unknown)
GET https://jplawdb2.github.io/meta/catalog.json   <- Full catalog
GET https://jplawdb2.github.io/meta/{code}.json    <- Article title index
GET https://jplawdb2.github.io/meta/hanrei.json    <- Court case index

## YAML Front Matter (every .txt file)
Each file starts with YAML front matter containing:
  schema_version, code, article_id, title, cite_key, law_num, last_amended, status
This metadata is machine-readable for structured extraction.
